content.problemStatement:
Write a program to read a year as an input and find whether it is leap year or not. Also consider the end of the centuries.

Divisibility by 4: First, we check if the year is divisible by 4. If it is not divisible by 4, it is not a leap year.

Century years (divisible by 100): If the year is divisible by 100, we must also check if it is divisible by 400 to determine whether it is a leap year or not.
